MODULE: cosmos.integration.x402.solana_gate
FILE: cosmos/integration/x402/solana_gate.py (870 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: x402 Solana Payment Gate — Premium Quantum Trading API (Tiered)

Implements the x402 HTTP 402 protocol for Solana-native payments.
Two tiers:
  - Simulated Quantum (0.25 SOL): Quantum simulator with hardware-optimized weights
  - Real Quantum Hardware (1 SOL): IBM Quantum QPU execution

Supports: An

CLASSES:
- PaymentReceipt: Record of a verified x402 payment.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- X402SolanaStats: Track x402 payment statistics.
  Methods: def record_402(self)
  Methods: def record_verified(self, receipt: PaymentReceipt)
  Methods: def record_rejected(self)
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- SolanaPaymentVerifier: Verifies SOL transfer transactions on Solana mainnet.
Uses Helius parsed API (pr
  Methods: def is_replay(self, tx_signature: str) -> bool
  Methods: def mark_used(self, tx_signature: str)
  Methods: async def verify_sol_transfer(self, tx_signature: str, expected_recipient: str=ECOSYSTEM_WALLET, min

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def resolve_asset(token_input: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
- def determine_tier(amount_lamports: int) -> str
- def build_payment_required_payload(endpoint: str, resource_description: str='') -> dict
- def encode_x402_header(payload: dict) -> str
- def decode_x402_header(header_value: str) -> Optional[dict]
- def build_payment_response(receipt: PaymentReceipt) -> dict
- def get_x402_discovery_manifest() -> dict
- async def run_premium_quantum_analysis(token_address: str, tier: str='simulated') -> Dict[str, Any]
- def get_solana_verifier() -> SolanaPaymentVerifier
- def get_x402_stats() -> X402SolanaStats
